g.text: run(&mut self, world: &mut World, dt: f32)

ol.li: Exclusivity: World is mutably borrowed for the entire duration of tick.
Deferred Ops: Systems cannot mutate World structure (spawn/despawn) directly because the iterator over systems holds a reference.
Ordering: Systems execute in the exact order of registration.

g.text: pub fn tick(&mut self, dt: f32)
2. foreach sys in scheduler.vec { sys.run(world, dt) }

g.title: Points to actual instance on Heap
The core interface for all executable logic units
Points to actual instance on Heap
